visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
A national visa is the permission granted by the Slovak Republic authorising its holder for the stay in the territory of the Slovak Republic for the duration of the validity of the visa and in other Member States for a period not exceeding 90 days in any 180-day period under the conditions stipulated in the Schengen Borders Code. The national visa may be issued with maximum validity of 1 year.
The conditions of granting of the national visa are regulated by the Act No. 404/2011 Coll. on Residence of Foreigners and on the Amendment and Supplementation to Certain Acts (https://www.slov-lex.sk/pravne-predpisy/SK/ZZ/2011/404/).
A third country national may be granted a national visa:
- on the basis of a granted residence permit; 
- for the purpose of submission of the residence permit application in the Slovak Republic;
- if the applicant is older than 15 years and is accepted for language education at an accredited language school in the extent of not less than 25 lessons per week;
- if it is in the interest of the Slovak Republic
- if it is necessary in order to fulfil the obligations of the Slovak Republic following from international treaties; 
- if the applicant is a family member of a foreigner who was granted asylum or subsidiary protection.

## Visa Fees

[svk > isr > en > National Visa > Visa Fees]
The above-mentioned Visa Fee is to be paid in Cash, ILS only according to the rate provided by the Embassy.
VFS Service charge:
Applicants applying at the Visa Application Centre shall be levied a service charge of 45 EUR payable in ILS cash, only.
Please Note:
- The applicant for a national visa shall allow the collection of his/her fingerprints. Fingerprints are not collected from the applicants under 12 years of age.
- In case of the refusal of granting of the national visa the fee is non-refundable.

## Documents Required
The list of required documents for applying for a national visa varies depending on the purpose for which the visa is requested. Applicants are therefore requested to contact the Embassy of the Slovak Republic in Tel Aviv to obtain a list of documents required in their specific case. For more information on national visas, we recommend the following website: 
National visa | Ministry of Foreign and European Affairs of the Slovak Republic (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/isr/en/svk/visa-type#nationalvisatotheholderoftheresidencepermit)

## Photo Specifications
Please provide one recent colour photograph (not more than 6 months old) of yourself, meeting the following requirements:
- Taken against a light (white or off-white) background so that features are distinguishable and contrast against the background.
- Clear quality and with the face in focus
- Full face: non-smiling, no sunglasses, no hat/cap or any head covering, unless the applicant wears such items because of his/her religious belief or ethnic background
- Printed on normal photographic paper (camera print)
- Please stick the photograph on the Visa Application Form
If the photographs presented do not meet these requirements (click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/one-pager/slovakia/india/english/pdf/PhotoSpecifications.pdf)), then the visa application will be considered incomplete and applicant will be asked to take new photographs in the photo booth in the visa application centre.

## Processing Time
From the date of receipt of application at the Embassy/Consulate General of Slovakia, it takes 30 working days to process the visa application. The duration of days when the application is in transit between the Visa Application Centre and the Embassy/Consulate General are not counted

## Download Forms
Application Form
The list of required documents for applying for a national visa varies depending on the purpose for which the visa is requested. Applicants are therefore requested to contact the Embassy of the Slovak Republic in Tel Aviv to obtain a list of documents required in their specific case. For more information on national visas, we recommend the following website:
National Visa | Embassy of the Slovak Republic in Tel Aviv (https://www.mzv.sk/en/web/telaviv-en/services/national_visa)

visa_types.name: Study, Research or attending other types of training (seminars, vocational or theoretical courses, scientific conferences)
visa_types.documents_required:
- Document Checklist – Click here (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/5tMSXMtiwV5VmaA6TSFTQb/58f44fbc552f4ea00b632c4e40c4edd7/Slovakia_Schengen_visa_-_list_of_documents.pdf)
- Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries.
visa_types.visa_fees:
[svk > isr > en > Short Term > Visa Fees]
The above-mentioned Visa Fee is to be paid in Cash, ILS only according to the rate provided by the Embassy.
VFS Service charge:
Applicants applying at the Visa Application Centre shall be levied a service charge of 45 EUR payable in ILS cash, only.
Please Note:
- children under the age of 12 years (i.e. children that are 12 years of age minus 1 day old).
- The applicable visa fee in ILS is as per the current exchange rate. The same is subject to change without notice.
- The Visa fee and service charges are non-refundable in case the visa is refused.
visa_types.processing_time:
From the date of receipt of application at the Embassy of Slovakia, it takes 15 working days to process the visa application. The duration of days when the application is in transit between the Visa Application Centre and the Embassy are not counted.
Applications may be lodged up to six months before the start of the intended visit. An application will not be accepted, if intending to travel in 15 days or less.
visa_types.forms:
Application for Visa
To Download a Form:
- Click on the form link
- When the form opens, save the form on your computer.
OR
- Press the right button on your mouse on the required link.
- Select Save Target As from the list
- Save the form on your computer.
visa_types.overview:
Overview
This category of visa caters to people wishing to visit Slovakia for Study, Research or other types of training. Applicants will have to provide evidence that he/she falls under this category.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
This category of visa caters to people wishing to visit Slovakia for Study, Research or other types of training. Applicants will have to provide evidence that he/she falls under this category.

## Visa Fees

[svk > isr > en > Short Term > Visa Fees]
The above-mentioned Visa Fee is to be paid in Cash, ILS only according to the rate provided by the Embassy.
VFS Service charge:
Applicants applying at the Visa Application Centre shall be levied a service charge of 45 EUR payable in ILS cash, only.
Please Note:
- children under the age of 12 years (i.e. children that are 12 years of age minus 1 day old).
- The applicable visa fee in ILS is as per the current exchange rate. The same is subject to change without notice.
- The Visa fee and service charges are non-refundable in case the visa is refused.

## Documents Required
- Document Checklist – Click here (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/5tMSXMtiwV5VmaA6TSFTQb/58f44fbc552f4ea00b632c4e40c4edd7/Slovakia_Schengen_visa_-_list_of_documents.pdf)
- Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries.

## Photo Specifications
Please provide one recent colour photograph (not more than 6 months old) of yourself, meeting the following requirements:
- Taken against a light (white or off-white) background so that features are distinguishable and contrast against the background.
- Clear quality and with the face in focus
- Full face: non-smiling, no sunglasses, no hat/cap or any head covering, unless the applicant wears such items because of his/her religious belief or ethnic background
- Printed on normal photographic paper (camera print)
- Please stick the photograph on the Visa Application Form
If the photographs presented do not meet these requirements (click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/one-pager/slovakia/india/english/pdf/PhotoSpecifications.pdf)), then the visa application will be considered incomplete and applicant will be asked to take new photographs in the photo booth in the visa application centre.

## Processing Time
From the date of receipt of application at the Embassy of Slovakia, it takes 15 working days to process the visa application. The duration of days when the application is in transit between the Visa Application Centre and the Embassy are not counted.
Applications may be lodged up to six months before the start of the intended visit. An application will not be accepted, if intending to travel in 15 days or less.

## Download Forms
Application for Visa
To Download a Form:
- Click on the form link
- When the form opens, save the form on your computer.
OR
- Press the right button on your mouse on the required link.
- Select Save Target As from the list
- Save the form on your computer.

visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Visit to family or friend visa application is applicable in case you are travelling for visiting your family member or friend.
General Public are hereby informed that a family member of the citizens of EU/EEA and Swiss Confederation is the third country national who is:
- his/her spouse; 
- his/her child younger than 21 years of age, his/her dependent child and dependent children of his/her spouse;
- his/her dependent direct relative in descending or ascending line and such a person of his/her spouse;
- any other family member to whom par. (a) to (c) do not apply and he/she is a dependent person in the country of his/her origin;
- any other family member to whom par. (a) to (c) do not apply and he/she is the member of his/her household;
- any other family member to whom par. (a) to (c) do not apply and he/she depends on his/her care due to serious health reasons;
- his/her partner with whom the Union citizen is in a permanent, duly certified relationship;
- a third country national with the right of residence in the same member state in which the Union citizen has the right of residence, and the Union citizen is a Slovak Republic national with whom the third country national returns or joins to reside in Slovakia.

## Visa Fees

[svk > isr > en > Short Term > Visa Fees]
The above-mentioned Visa Fee is to be paid in Cash, ILS only according to the rate provided by the Embassy.
VFS Service charge:
Applicants applying at the Visa Application Centre shall be levied a service charge of 45 EUR payable in ILS cash, only.
Please Note:
- children under the age of 12 years (i.e. children that are 12 years of age minus 1 day old).
- The applicable visa fee in ILS is as per the current exchange rate. The same is subject to change without notice.
- The Visa fee and service charges are non-refundable in case the visa is refused.

## Documents Required
- Document Checklist – Click here (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/5tMSXMtiwV5VmaA6TSFTQb/58f44fbc552f4ea00b632c4e40c4edd7/Slovakia_Schengen_visa_-_list_of_documents.pdf)
- Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries.

## Photo Specifications
Please provide one recent colour photograph (not more than 6 months old) of yourself, meeting the following requirements:
- Taken against a light (white or off-white) background so that features are distinguishable and contrast against the background.
- Clear quality and with the face in focus
- Full face: non-smiling, no sunglasses, no hat/cap or any head covering, unless the applicant wears such items because of his/her religious belief or ethnic background
- Printed on normal photographic paper (camera print)
- Please stick the photograph on the Visa Application Form
If the photographs presented do not meet these requirements (click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/one-pager/slovakia/india/english/pdf/PhotoSpecifications.pdf)), then the visa application will be considered incomplete and applicant will be asked to take new photographs in the photo booth in the visa application centre.

## Processing Time
From the date of receipt of application at the Embassy of Slovakia, it takes 15 working days to process the visa application. The duration of days when the application is in transit between the Visa Application Centre and the Embassy are not counted.
Applications may be lodged up to six months before the start of the intended visit. An application will not be accepted, if intending to travel in 15 days or less.

## Download Forms
Application for Visa
To Download a Form:
- Click on the form link
- When the form opens, save the form on your computer.
OR
- Press the right button on your mouse on the required link.
- Select Save Target As from the list
- Save the form on your computer.

visa_types.overview:
Overview
Business visa application is applicable in case you are travelling for business purposes. 
This visa is given for travel period of less than 90 days. This visa will be issued for business purpose only; for gainful professional activities (even if the work is not financially rewarded) you have to apply for a work permit.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Business visa application is applicable in case you are travelling for business purposes. 
This visa is given for travel period of less than 90 days. This visa will be issued for business purpose only; for gainful professional activities (even if the work is not financially rewarded) you have to apply for a work permit.

## Visa Fees

[svk > isr > en > Short Term > Visa Fees]
The above-mentioned Visa Fee is to be paid in Cash, ILS only according to the rate provided by the Embassy.
VFS Service charge:
Applicants applying at the Visa Application Centre shall be levied a service charge of 45 EUR payable in ILS cash, only.
Please Note:
- children under the age of 12 years (i.e. children that are 12 years of age minus 1 day old).
- The applicable visa fee in ILS is as per the current exchange rate. The same is subject to change without notice.
- The Visa fee and service charges are non-refundable in case the visa is refused.

- Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries.

Please provide one recent colour photograph (not more than 6 months old) of yourself, meeting the following requirements:
- Taken against a light (white or off-white) background so that features are distinguishable and contrast against the background.
